generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor providing input torque (τ_M) based on motor current (I_M) for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot."
]

instance GearTransmission : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gear transmission system transforming rotational energy between motor and gearbox, outputting torque (τ_G)."
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox providing final torque output (τ_out) and angular velocity (ω_out) for the first axis."
]

instance SINUMERIK840DslController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller executing control commands (position, speed, acceleration) and receiving feedback for the first axis."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance MotorShaftEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted on motor shaft providing angular position data (q) for torque derivation (τ_M) and backlash reduction."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorShaftEncoderData
]

instance GearboxSecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted behind gearbox providing output angular position data (q) for friction/elasticity analysis via encoder discrepancy."
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxEncoderData
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor current sensor measuring input current (I_M) for torque derivation (τ_M) in real-time."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentData
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance MotorShaftEncoderData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorShaftEncoder
]

instance GearboxEncoderData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxSecondaryEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance SysMLStructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram representing structural components (Motor, Gearbox, CycloidalGearbox) and their relationships."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLTool
]

instance SysMLFlowDefinition : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML flow definitions for rotational energy (τ, ω) and electrical energy (I_M) between components."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLTool
]

instance SimulinkFrictionlessBaselineModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model simulating frictionless ideal torque/velocity behavior as baseline reference."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box Coulomb-Viscous friction model with configurable parameters (load, temperature) for torque/velocity simulation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box Stribeck friction model accounting for lubrication effects in gearbox dynamics."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box Dahl friction model capturing dynamic friction behavior with state-dependent parameters."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box LuGre friction model providing advanced friction dynamics with bristle deflection and stiffness parameters."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance BlackBoxFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Data-driven black-box friction model calibrated using operational data for real-time adaptation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance TorqueDerivationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Data calculation model deriving torque (τ_M, τ_G, τ_out) from motor current (I_M) and dynamics equations."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance AngularVelocityDerivationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Data calculation model deriving angular velocity (ω) and acceleration (α) from encoder data (q)."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance MeasuredTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of measured torque values (τ_M, τ_G, τ_out) derived from motor current and dynamics."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentData, GearboxEncoderData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance MeasuredAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of measured angular velocity (ω) and acceleration (α) derived from encoder position data (q)."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorShaftEncoderData, GearboxEncoderData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance SimulatedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of simulated torque values (τ̂_M, τ̂_G, τ̂_out) including friction effects from Simulink models."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentData, GearboxEncoderData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance SimulatedAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of simulated angular velocity (ω̂) with friction effects from Simulink models."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorShaftEncoderData, GearboxEncoderData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance FrictionModelParameters : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Configurable friction model parameters (e.g., Coulomb coefficient, viscosity, Stribeck curve parameters) updated via operational data."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

// C11: Enablers
instance SysMLTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML modeling tool for creating structural/behavioral models (Block Definition Diagrams, Internal Block Diagrams)."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService, MultiPhysicsSimulationService
]

instance SimulinkTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for executable friction/kinematic simulations with white-box and black-box models."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService, MultiPhysicsSimulationService, DataVisualizationService
]

instance MATLABTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB for friction model calibration and parameter optimization."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance MQTTProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time streaming of sensor data (I_M, q) from physical system to digital shadow."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataIntegrationService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShellFramework : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell (AAS) framework for semantic interoperability of digital twin components."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataIntegrationService
]

// C6: Services
instance FrictionModelIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time white-box (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre) and black-box friction model calibration using Simulink/MATLAB."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionCharacterizationInsight, FrictionModelUpdateAction
]

instance MultiPhysicsSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Executable Simulink models simulating frictionless ideal behavior and friction effects (τ̂, ω̂) for deviation analysis."
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAccuracyInsight, FrictionEffectAnalysisInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Unified dashboard displaying measured vs. simulated torque/velocity (τ_M, τ_G, τ_out, ω) with deviation analysis."
    DTDFVocab:provides DeviationAnalysisInsight
]

instance DataIntegrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Aggregation and semantic linking of sensor data traces (I_M, q) to models via metadata and processing logs."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTraceabilityInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance FrictionCharacterizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identification of static, kinetic, and viscous friction components in the gearbox via model calibration."
]

instance FrictionModelUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Parameter updates for CNC controllers (e.g., friction compensation in τ_M calculations) based on friction model drift."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance MotionAccuracyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of motion accuracy deviations between simulated (frictionless) and measured behavior."
]

instance FrictionEffectAnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Quantitative assessment of friction effects on torque/velocity output (τ_out, ω_out) compared to baseline."
]

instance DeviationAnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time comparison of simulated vs. reference data (τ̂ vs. τ, ω̂ vs. ω) with threshold-based alerts."
]

instance DataTraceabilityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Semantic linking of data traces to models via metadata (source, processing method, timestamp) for provenance."
]

instance RecalibrationTriggerInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of deviations exceeding thresholds, triggering manual recalibration of CNC controller parameters."
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Wear detection via friction model drift analysis for predictive maintenance scheduling."
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The **virtual-to-physical interaction** is **nonexistent** in this digital shadow implementation, as it operates as a **passive entity** (one-way data flow from PT to DS). However, the DS **enables indirect improvements** to the physical system by:
  - Providing **real-time friction model updates** (via white-box/black-box models) to **improve control algorithms** (e.g., CNC compensation).
  - Generating **insights for manual adjustments** (e.g., recalibration of friction parameters in the CNC controller).
  The DS does not autonomously execute actions on the PT; its outputs are **visualized in a dashboard** for human interpretation."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The **twinning time scale** is **real-time (online)** with:
  - **Continuous data streaming** via MQTT (sensor updates at **control loop frequencies** of the SINUMERIK 840D sl, typically **1–10 ms** for industrial robots).
  - **Dynamic friction model updates**: Models are **recalibrated during operation** to account for **wear, temperature, or load changes**.
  - **Synchronization**: The DS operates **synchronously** with the PT’s operational timeline, enabling **live comparison** of simulated (virtual) and measured (physical) data."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The **DT constellation** is structured as follows:
  - **Centralized Architecture**: A single **FrictionShadow** instance encapsulates all components.
  - **Components**:
    - **Asset**: *Mabi* (first axis of MABI MAX robot), described via **SysML SystemModel**.
    - **Sources**: Physical sensors (*I_M*, encoders) and **processing components** (*Simulation_M*, *Simulation_GW*, *Simulation_GB*).
    - **Models**: Linked via **conformance relations** to the **DSRM** (e.g., *DataTrace* → *I_M*, *τ_M*).
    - **Processing**: Executes **data calculation/simulation models** to generate derived data traces (e.g., *τ̂_G*).
  - **Orchestration**: Data flows from **sensors → processing components → dashboard**, with **no feedback loop** to the PT."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The **life-cycle stages** covered by the DS include:
  - **As Operated**: The DS focuses on the **real-time operational phase**, capturing **live data** and **dynamic friction behavior** during robot operation.
  - **Representation**: The DS provides a **real-time digital replica** of the **first axis’s physical state**, including:
    - **Structural model** (SysML *Block Definition Diagram*).
    - **Behavioral models** (Simulink friction/kinematic simulations).
  - **No explicit design/manufacturing phases**: The DS does not model the **as-designed** or **as-manufactured** states; it is **purpose-built for operational accuracy improvement**."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The **fidelity and validity considerations** include:
  - **Model Fidelity**:
    - **White-box models** (analytical) are **parameter-dependent** (e.g., Stribeck curve requires load/temperature inputs).
    - **Black-box models** (data-driven) avoid parameter tuning but require **large datasets** for training.
    - **Validation**: Compare **simulated vs. measured torque/velocity** to quantify **friction-induced inaccuracies** (e.g., 30% error reduction target).
  - **Uncertainty Sources**:
    - **Sensor noise** (encoder/current sensor inaccuracies).
    - **Model simplifications** (e.g., ignoring backlash in gearbox).
    - **Dynamic changes** (wear, temperature drift).
  - **Verification Mechanisms**:
    - **Real-time deviation analysis** in the dashboard.
    - **Traceability links** between data traces and models (e.g., *τ̂_G* → *Simulation_GW*)."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The **DT technical connection** relies on:
  - **Network Protocol**: **MQTT** for **low-latency, high-frequency sensor data streaming** (e.g., *I_M*, encoder angles).
  - **Data Format**: **Time-series arrays** of floating-point values (*τ*, *ω*, *I_M*) with **metadata** (source, timestamp).
  - **Architecture**: **Centralized** with no explicit **edge/cloud hybrid** mentioned. Data is processed **locally** (e.g., Simulink on a PC) or via **CNC controller** (SINUMERIK 840D sl)."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The **DT hosting/deployment** is:
  - **Local/On-Premise**: The DS runs on **industrial PCs** or **CNC-integrated systems** (e.g., SINUMERIK 840D sl).
  - **Software Stack**:
    - **Simulation**: MathWorks Simulink/MATLAB.
    - **Modeling**: SysML tools (e.g., IBM Engineering Systems Design Rhapsody).
    - **Dashboard**: Custom **real-time visualization** (technology unspecified but implied to be web-based or industrial HMI).
  - **No cloud deployment** mentioned; focus is on **real-time operational use**."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The **horizontal integration** is **limited to internal systems**:
  - **CNC Controller (SINUMERIK 840D sl)**: Receives **reference data** (e.g., target *τ*, *ω*) and **sensor feedback**.
  - **No external DTs or ERP/MES systems** mentioned.
  - **Potential for extension**: The **Asset Administration Shell (AAS)** framework is implied for **semantic interoperability** but not detailed."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The **standardization** efforts include:
  - **Modeling**: **SysML** (ISO 10303-1, ISO 19505) for structural/behavioral models.
  - **Simulation**: **MathWorks Simulink** (de facto standard for control systems).
  - **Digital Shadow Reference Model (DSRM)**: Custom **UML-based reference model** (not a formal standard but derived from [32], [15]).
  - **Data Exchange**: **MQTT** (OASIS standard) for sensor data streaming.
  - **No explicit compliance** with **Industry 4.0 standards** (e.g., RAMI 4.0, IEC 62264) is mentioned."
]
